tests.prompt: Use the nemo-skill-selection skill to figure out where I should start.
Run nemo-skill-selection. I have a NeMo Platform task and need it dispatched.
Invoke the nemo-skill-selection skill on this conversation.
I want to try NeMo. Where do I start?
Help me build an agent on NeMo Platform.
I want to improve the agent I already have using NeMo.
We are prepping for a customer demo tomorrow. They want to see the NeMo agent platform end-to-end. Get it running and build something simple.
Cloned the Platform repo this morning. Never used NeMo before. What is the first step.
Got a LangGraph agent in production. Want to put it through NeMo Platform to harden and evaluate it.
Design a system for routing customer queries across three different teams. Help me think through the tradeoffs.
Help me set up a new Postgres database on my laptop with the test fixtures.
What is the weather in San Francisco today?
